name: Indonesian Soy Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 Bottles Regular Soy Sauce (17 oz. each, China Lily)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large pot.
2. Cook on medium heat until onions are limp.
3. Add sugar and bring to a boil to dissolve the sugar.
4. Strain the mixture and pour into bottles.
5. Store in the refrigerator (optional).
